features: Redesigned Client Patrol Requests page into premium command-center layout
Added request types: Immediate Patrol, Vacation Watch, Recurring Patrol, Scheduled Patrol
Added dynamic schedule fields for each patrol request type
Added requested services checkboxes, proof preference, instructions, and schedule notes
Added device-only reference photo/video picker with local preview and no URL input
Added selected property rail, request summary, recent requests, property map, and request history table
Submits advanced schedule fields to existing cp_submit_patrol_request RPC with fallback compatibility
